en: I love words I thank you for hearing my words I want to tell you something about words that I think is important I love
ko: 나는 말을 사랑해. 내 말을 들어줘서 고마워.

en: as I say they're my work they're my play they're my passion Words are all we have really We have thoughts but thoughts are fluid you
ko: 내가 중요하다고 생각하는 말에 대해 이야기하고 싶어.

en: And then we assign a word to a thought
ko: 내가 말하는 대로, 그건 내 일이고, 내 놀이이고, 내 열정이야.

en: And we're stuck with that word for that thought So be careful with words I like to think yeah the same words you know that
ko: 말은 우리가 가진 전부야. 우리는 생각을 가지고 있지만, 생각은 유동적이지.

en: hurt can heal It's a matter of how you pick them There are some people that aren't into all the words There are some people that would have you not use
Yeah there are 400 000 words in the English language and there are seven of them you can't say on television
ko: 그래서 그 생각에 대해 그 단어에 갇히게 돼.
그러니까 단어를 조심해. 나는 같은 단어가 상처를 줄 수도 있고 치유할 수도 있다고 생각해.
모든 단어에 관심 없는 사람들도 있어.

en: They'd have to be outrageous to be separated from a group that large
ko: 어떤 사람들은 특정 단어를 사용하지 않게 하려고 해.
